bupt.ta.service

类 EmailNotificationService

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.service.EmailNotificationService

  • public class EmailNotificationService
extends java.lang.Object
    Sends emails using SMTP settings from admin settings, system properties or environment variables. Disabled by default until host/from are configured.

    • 嵌套类概要

      嵌套类 
      限定符和类型 类和说明
      static class  EmailNotificationService.EmailSettings
      Resolved SMTP and portal settings used to send mail.
      static class  EmailNotificationService.SendResult
      Outcome of a single send attempt.

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      EmailNotificationService() 

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      boolean isConfigured() 
      boolean isConfigured(AdminSettings adminSettings) 
      EmailNotificationService.EmailSettings loadSettings()
      Loads SMTP settings from environment, local properties, and optional admin overrides.
      EmailNotificationService.EmailSettings loadSettings(AdminSettings adminSettings) 
      java.lang.String maybeAppendPortalLink(java.lang.String body, java.lang.String relativePath)
      Appends a portal URL line when ta.mail.appBaseUrl is configured.
      java.lang.String maybeAppendPortalLink(java.lang.String body, java.lang.String relativePath, AdminSettings adminSettings) 
      java.lang.String renderHtmlTemplate(java.lang.String title, java.lang.String bodyText, java.lang.String actionText, java.lang.String actionUrl) 
      java.lang.String renderHtmlTemplate(java.lang.String title, java.lang.String displayName, java.lang.String bodyText, java.lang.String actionText, java.lang.String actionUrl) 
      java.lang.String resolvePortalUrl(java.lang.String relativePath, AdminSettings adminSettings)
      Builds an absolute portal URL for a relative path.
      EmailNotificationService.SendResult sendHtml(java.lang.String to, java.lang.String subject, java.lang.String plainBody, java.lang.String htmlBody, AdminSettings adminSettings)
      Sends a multipart alternative message (plain + HTML).
      EmailNotificationService.SendResult sendPlainText(java.lang.String to, java.lang.String subject, java.lang.String body) 
      EmailNotificationService.SendResult sendPlainText(java.lang.String to, java.lang.String subject, java.lang.String body, AdminSettings adminSettings)

    • 构造器详细资料

      • EmailNotificationService

        public EmailNotificationService()

    • 方法详细资料

      • loadSettings

        public EmailNotificationService.EmailSettings loadSettings()
        Loads SMTP settings from environment, local properties, and optional admin overrides.
        返回:
        resolved settings (never null)

      • loadSettings

        public EmailNotificationService.EmailSettings loadSettings(AdminSettings adminSettings)
        参数:
        adminSettings - optional admin UI settings (may be null)
        返回:
        resolved settings (never null)

      • isConfigured

        public boolean isConfigured()
        返回:
        true when SMTP host and from-address are configured

      • isConfigured

        public boolean isConfigured(AdminSettings adminSettings)
        参数:
        adminSettings - optional admin UI settings
        返回:
        true when SMTP host and from-address are configured

      • sendPlainText

        public EmailNotificationService.SendResult sendPlainText(java.lang.String to,
                                                         java.lang.String subject,
                                                         java.lang.String body)
        参数:
        to - recipient address
        subject - message subject
        body - plain-text body
        返回:
        send outcome

      • sendPlainText

        public EmailNotificationService.SendResult sendPlainText(java.lang.String to,
                                                         java.lang.String subject,
                                                         java.lang.String body,
                                                         AdminSettings adminSettings)
        参数:
        to - recipient address
        subject - message subject
        body - plain-text body
        adminSettings - optional admin SMTP overrides
        返回:
        send outcome

      • sendHtml

        public EmailNotificationService.SendResult sendHtml(java.lang.String to,
                                                    java.lang.String subject,
                                                    java.lang.String plainBody,
                                                    java.lang.String htmlBody,
                                                    AdminSettings adminSettings)
        Sends a multipart alternative message (plain + HTML).
        参数:
        to - recipient address
        subject - message subject
        plainBody - plain-text fallback
        htmlBody - HTML body
        adminSettings - optional admin SMTP overrides
        返回:
        send outcome

      • maybeAppendPortalLink

        public java.lang.String maybeAppendPortalLink(java.lang.String body,
                                              java.lang.String relativePath)
        Appends a portal URL line when ta.mail.appBaseUrl is configured.
        参数:
        body - existing message body
        relativePath - path under the app base URL (e.g. /ta/applications)
        返回:
        body with link appended, or unchanged when not configured

      • maybeAppendPortalLink

        public java.lang.String maybeAppendPortalLink(java.lang.String body,
                                              java.lang.String relativePath,
                                              AdminSettings adminSettings)
        参数:
        adminSettings - optional admin SMTP overrides
        返回:
        body with link appended, or unchanged when not configured

      • resolvePortalUrl

        public java.lang.String resolvePortalUrl(java.lang.String relativePath,
                                         AdminSettings adminSettings)
        Builds an absolute portal URL for a relative path.
        参数:
        relativePath - path under the app base URL
        adminSettings - optional admin SMTP overrides
        返回:
        absolute URL, or null when base URL is not configured

      • renderHtmlTemplate

        public java.lang.String renderHtmlTemplate(java.lang.String title,
                                           java.lang.String bodyText,
                                           java.lang.String actionText,
                                           java.lang.String actionUrl)
        返回:
        branded HTML email document

      • renderHtmlTemplate

        public java.lang.String renderHtmlTemplate(java.lang.String title,
                                           java.lang.String displayName,
                                           java.lang.String bodyText,
                                           java.lang.String actionText,
                                           java.lang.String actionUrl)
        参数:
        title - email heading
        displayName - optional recipient name shown in the body
        bodyText - plain message (newlines converted to HTML)
        actionText - optional button label
        actionUrl - optional button href
        返回:
        branded HTML email document
